elements.name: slide-subtitle
elements.text: The project follows a clear MERN separation: React renders the experience, Express owns the API, and MongoDB persists users and repair jobs.
elements.textPreview: The project follows a clear MERN separation: React renders the experience, Express owns the API, and MongoDB persists users and repair jobs.

lines.text: The project follows a clear MERN separation: React renders the experience, Express owns the API, and MongoDB persists users and repair jobs.

paragraphs.text: The project follows a clear MERN separation: React renders the experience, Express owns the API, and MongoDB persists users and repair jobs.

runs.text: The project follows a clear MERN separation: React renders the experience, Express owns the API, and MongoDB persists users and repair jobs.

elements.name: arch-react-body
elements.text: App.jsx controls authentication state, dashboard tabs, repair data, filters, and customer tracking mode.
elements.textPreview: App.jsx controls authentication state, dashboard tabs, repair data, filters, and customer tracking mode.

lines.text: dashboard tabs, repair data, filters, and

runs.text: App.jsx controls authentication state, dashboard tabs, repair data, filters, and customer tracking mode.

elements.name: arch-api-body
elements.text: Routes handle auth, protected repair CRUD, public tracking, CORS, and health checks.
elements.textPreview: Routes handle auth, protected repair CRUD, public tracking, CORS, and health checks.

lines.text: Routes handle auth, protected repair CRUD,
public tracking, CORS, and health checks.

paragraphs.text: Routes handle auth, protected repair CRUD, public tracking, CORS, and health checks.

runs.text: Routes handle auth, protected repair CRUD, public tracking, CORS, and health checks.

elements.name: arch-db-body
elements.text: User and RepairJob schemas store accounts, ownership, tracking codes, costs, statuses, and timestamps.
elements.textPreview: User and RepairJob schemas store accounts, ownership, tracking codes, costs, statuses, and timestamps.

paragraphs.text: User and RepairJob schemas store accounts, ownership, tracking codes, costs, statuses, and timestamps.

runs.text: User and RepairJob schemas store accounts, ownership, tracking codes, costs, statuses, and timestamps.

elements.name: public-note
elements.text: Public path: /api/repairs/track/:trackingCode returns limited customer-facing repair information.
elements.textPreview: Public path: /api/repairs/track/:trackingCode returns limited customer-facing repair information.

runs.text: Public path: /api/repairs/track/:trackingCode returns limited customer-facing repair information.

elements.name: private-note
elements.text: Private path: all staff repair routes use the protect middleware and user-scoped database queries.
